guidance: ~5 GW under construction (Buxar thermal, Sunni/Dhaulasidh/Luhri hydro, solar).
Long-term ambition 25 GW by 2030; near-term interest and depreciation a drag.
Luhri/Dhaulasidh/Sunni hydro face disputes with the Himachal Pradesh government.
insights: Total generation 13,302 MU (+25% YoY); Q4 revenue at record ₹1,496cr.
Q4 net loss ₹118cr — interest cost doubled to a record ₹522cr as commissioned projects hit P&L.
concall.orderExecution: ~5 GW under construction commissions over FY27-FY28; hydro is long-gestation with some Himachal state disputes.
